TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_saungay_nu_binawlan-20170924_Palamal_kakitizaan_milingatuay_a_pataungay, title = saungay_nu_binawlan-20170924_Palamal_kakitizaan_milingatuay_a_pataungay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/saungay_nu_binawlan-20170924_Palamal_kakitizaan_milingatuay_a_pataungay} }

S.FORM: == 20170924 Palamal kakitizaan milingatuay a pataungay == tatukian 2017 mihca 9 bulad 24 demiad (pilipayay) puenengan Kalingku, Soufeng xiang, Ciwidiyan niyazu' tayni mitengilay: Sakizaya mapalaway, Sakizaya patuduay, Lubas-kuwansaedap milingatuay a Pataungay malucekay kakitizaan atu subal: matatengi ku mapalaway atu milungucay i teban misalisinay: i teban ku kapahay malucekay papayzaan: sawaliyan a papayzaan miwawada' tu kawaw: miwawada' ku lisin a kawaw tu tayniay a mapalaway malucekay tu kawaw: milucek aca ku kawaw mililuc: miliuc ku kidu nu mapalaway mupuhpuh: miasik miawaw tu dietu patakid pakan mibaung midungus tu dietu misazikuz mililuc tatiku natayniay ci Balucu' sasaydang,Su Yi Ru sasaydang, Dungy Sela mapalaway, Lin Xing Yu mapalaway, Micyang Kuli mapalaway, Uul Balaw patuduay, Balah Huisin, Kulihusin Sayiun, Tuku Sayiun, Balaw , Caijinmu, Nuwatan o Kumud, Wukuomin, wukuoxiong, Kaoxiande, Liyiwei, Huangtefu, Huangchi, Caiwenjin muazih tu tatengaay belih nu Hulam a kumu namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan napatizeng ni Tiway Sayiun kalisiw putiput
S.PHON: == ******** par~…ĺamar~…ĺ kakitizaan mir~…ĺiŇčatuaj a patauŇčaj == tatukian **** mińß ¶a * bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad (pir~…ĺipajaj) pu…ôn…ôŇčan kar~…ĺiŇčku, souf…ôŇč *iaŇč, ¶iwidijan nijazu Ē~ ° tajni mit…ôŇčir~…ĺaj: sakizaja mapar~…ĺawaj, sakizaja patuduaj, r~…ĺubas-kuwansa…ôdap mir~…ĺiŇčatuaj a patauŇčaj mar~…ĺu ¶…ôkaj kakitizaan atu subar~…ĺ: matat…ôŇči ku mapar~…ĺawaj atu mir~…ĺuŇču ¶aj i t…ôban misar~…ĺisinaj: i t…ôban ku kapańßaj mar~…ĺu ¶…ôkaj papajzaan: sawar~…ĺijan a papajzaan miwawada Ē~ ° tu kawaw: miwawada Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺisin a kawaw tu tajniaj a mapar~…ĺawaj mar~…ĺu ¶…ôkaj tu kawaw: mir~…ĺu ¶…ôk a ¶a ku kawaw mir~…ĺir~…ĺu ¶: mir~…ĺiu ¶ ku kidu nu mapar~…ĺawaj mupuńßpuńß: miasik miawaw tu di…ôtu patakid pakan mibauŇč miduŇčus tu di…ôtu misazikuz mir~…ĺir~…ĺu ¶ tatiku natajniaj ¶i bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° sasajdaŇč,su ji *u sasajdaŇč, duŇčj s…ôr~…ĺa mapar~…ĺawaj, r~…ĺin *iŇč ju mapar~…ĺawaj, mi ¶jaŇč kur~…ĺi mapar~…ĺawaj, uur~…ĺ bar~…ĺaw patuduaj, bar~…ĺańß ńßuisin, kur~…ĺińßusin sajiun, tuku sajiun, bar~…ĺaw , ¶aijinmu, nuwatan o kumud, wukuomin, wukuo*ioŇč, kao*iand…ô, r~…ĺijiw…ôi, ńßuaŇčt…ôfu, ńßuaŇč ¶ńßi, ¶aiw…ônjin muazińß tu tat…ôŇčaaj b…ôr~…ĺińß nu ńßur~…ĺam a kumu namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan napatiz…ôŇč ni tiwaj sajiun kar~…ĺisiw putiput
S.FORM: == 20170924 Palamal kakitizaan milingatuay a pataungay == tatukian 2017 mihca 9 bulad 24 demiad (pilipayay) puenengan Kalingku, Soufeng xiang, Ciwidiyan niyazu' tayni mitengilay: Sakizaya mapalaway, Sakizaya patuduay, Lubas-kuwansaedap milingatuay a Pataungay malucekay kakitizaan atu subal: matatengi ku mapalaway atu milungucay i teban misalisinay: i teban ku kapahay malucekay papayzaan: sawaliyan a papayzaan miwawada' tu kawaw: miwawada' ku lisin a kawaw tu tayniay a mapalaway malucekay tu kawaw: milucek aca ku kawaw mililuc: miliuc ku kidu nu mapalaway mupuhpuh: miasik miawaw tu dietu patakid pakan mibaung midungus tu dietu misazikuz mililuc tatiku natayniay ci Balucu' sasaydang,Su Yi Ru sasaydang, Dungy Sela mapalaway, Lin Xing Yu mapalaway, Micyang Kuli mapalaway, Uul Balaw patuduay, Balah Huisin, Kulihusin Sayiun, Tuku Sayiun, Balaw , Caijinmu, Nuwatan o Kumud, Wukuomin, wukuoxiong, Kaoxiande, Liyiwei, Huangtefu, Huangchi, Caiwenjin muazih tu tatengaay belih nu Hulam a kumu namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan napatizeng ni Tiway Sayiun kalisiw putiput
S.PHON: == ******** par~…ĺamar~…ĺ kakitizaan mir~…ĺiŇčatuaj a patauŇčaj == tatukian **** mińß ¶a * bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad (pir~…ĺipajaj) pu…ôn…ôŇčan kar~…ĺiŇčku, souf…ôŇč *iaŇč, ¶iwidijan nijazu Ē~ ° tajni mit…ôŇčir~…ĺaj: sakizaja mapar~…ĺawaj, sakizaja patuduaj, r~…ĺubas-kuwansa…ôdap mir~…ĺiŇčatuaj a patauŇčaj mar~…ĺu ¶…ôkaj kakitizaan atu subar~…ĺ: matat…ôŇči ku mapar~…ĺawaj atu mir~…ĺuŇču ¶aj i t…ôban misar~…ĺisinaj: i t…ôban ku kapańßaj mar~…ĺu ¶…ôkaj papajzaan: sawar~…ĺijan a papajzaan miwawada Ē~ ° tu kawaw: miwawada Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺisin a kawaw tu tajniaj a mapar~…ĺawaj mar~…ĺu ¶…ôkaj tu kawaw: mir~…ĺu ¶…ôk a ¶a ku kawaw mir~…ĺir~…ĺu ¶: mir~…ĺiu ¶ ku kidu nu mapar~…ĺawaj mupuńßpuńß: miasik miawaw tu di…ôtu patakid pakan mibauŇč miduŇčus tu di…ôtu misazikuz mir~…ĺir~…ĺu ¶ tatiku natajniaj ¶i bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° sasajdaŇč,su ji *u sasajdaŇč, duŇčj s…ôr~…ĺa mapar~…ĺawaj, r~…ĺin *iŇč ju mapar~…ĺawaj, mi ¶jaŇč kur~…ĺi mapar~…ĺawaj, uur~…ĺ bar~…ĺaw patuduaj, bar~…ĺańß ńßuisin, kur~…ĺińßusin sajiun, tuku sajiun, bar~…ĺaw , ¶aijinmu, nuwatan o kumud, wukuomin, wukuo*ioŇč, kao*iand…ô, r~…ĺijiw…ôi, ńßuaŇčt…ôfu, ńßuaŇč ¶ńßi, ¶aiw…ônjin muazińß tu tat…ôŇčaaj b…ôr~…ĺińß nu ńßur~…ĺam a kumu namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan napatiz…ôŇč ni tiwaj sajiun kar~…ĺisiw putiput
